rag_rules: Place input range assumptions in component type annexes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees within annex agree blocks.
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency between AGREE declarations and AADL data types.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly as AGREE variables.
Validate that all referenced identifiers exist in the AADL model scope.
Use boolean expressions for range checks when the data type supports it.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or declared variables.
anti_patterns: Do not generate assumptions or guarantees that reference undefined or non-visible identifiers.
Do not attempt to convert Boolean domain values into integers without explicit scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
